target_skill.name: chat-archive
target_skill.description: Trigger at session end — "archive this", "wrap up", "we're done", "start a new chat", or natural stopping points (budget low, milestone hit). Fires even mid-build; do not casually summarize instead.

competing_skills.name: chat-status
competing_skills.description: Mid-session checkpoint — "where are we", "status update", "what's next", summaries, topic shifts. Use proactively. Not session start (→ session-start) or close (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: session-start
competing_skills.description: Session onboarding on first message — "work on [project]", "continue [project]". Loads handoff + PLAN. Not "where are we" (→ chat-status) or archiving (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: grove
competing_skills.description: Capture, browse, update Grove tasks/ideas — "grove this", "what's in grove", "save this idea", "recent activity". Not for iOS reminders (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: add-to-do
competing_skills.description: Capture and surface tasks — "add to do", "remind me to", "note to self", "show my to-dos", "done with X". Routes to Grove. Not for new ideas (→ idea-scout) or vault ops (→ idea-vault).

positive_cases: Let's wrap up this chat — we're done with the rebuild for now
Archive this conversation, I want to start a new chat
We're done for the night, log the handoff before I close
Context is at 80% — wrap before we crash
negative_cases: Where are we on the Build Pipeline rebuild? (expect chat-status)
Let's continue work on Listing Lens v7 today (expect session-start)
Remind me to push the photo-diff fix tomorrow morning (expect add-to-do)
What's in grove right now — any new tasks since yesterday? (expect grove)
Quick status check on the rebuild before I head to dinner (expect chat-status)
